brain: AP HK - General Press and media

stakeholders.Canonical Name: Financial Services and the Treasury Bureau
stakeholders.Role: Provides data on public finance reserves in Hong Kong

Source metadata.filename: 2023_Failure to Address Population Aging Issue Puts Hong Kong's Public Finance at Risk.pdf
Source metadata.evidence_original: 根據財經事務及庫務局的最新資料，政府公共財政儲備已由2019至20年財政年度11709億元輾轉下降至2023至24財政年度的約7700億元（不包括綠債收入）。
Source metadata.evidence_translated: According to the latest data from the Financial Services and the Treasury Bureau, the government's public finance reserves have dropped from 1,171 billion HKD in the fiscal year 2019 to 2020 to approximately 770 billion HKD in the fiscal year 2023 to 2024 (excluding green bond income).

stakeholders.Role: Indicates labor market status and demand

Source metadata.filename: 2023_Failure to Address Population Aging Issue Puts Hong Kong's Public Finance at Risk.pdf
Source metadata.evidence_original: 勞⼯及福利局局長孫⽟菡表示，在勞⼯需求受經濟繼續增長所⽀持下，勞⼯市場短期內料會維持緊絀。
Source metadata.evidence_translated: The Secretary for Labour and Welfare, Sun Yuhan, stated that with labor demand supported by continued economic growth, the labor market is expected to remain tight in the short term.

stakeholders.Role: Provides statistics on population changes and unemployment

Source metadata.filename: 2023_Failure to Address Population Aging Issue Puts Hong Kong's Public Finance at Risk.pdf
Source metadata.evidence_original: 政府統計處今⽇（20⽇）公布最新數據，2023年年底⼈⼝數字為7,503,100。
Source metadata.evidence_translated: The Census and Statistics Department announced today (20th) the latest data, showing that the population number at the end of 2023 is 7,503,100.

stakeholders.Role: Implements policies related to housing and immigration

Source metadata.filename: 2023_Transferring elderly public housing residents to the Greater Bay Area to free up units for young workers.pdf
Source metadata.evidence_original: 例如香港政府自去年12月實施一系列「搶夜經濟不振」，其中一個經常被提出的解釋是行為模式改變
Source metadata.evidence_translated: For example, the Government of Hong Kong has implemented a series of measures since December last year to 'stimulate the sluggish night economy', one of which is often attributed to changes in behavior patterns.

stakeholders.Role: Proposed location for elderly housing relocation

Source metadata.filename: 2023_Transferring elderly public housing residents to the Greater Bay Area to free up units for young workers.pdf
Source metadata.evidence_original: 香港公屋老⼈在⼤灣區養老，騰出寶貴的公屋位置給年輕人及年輕家庭落地生根
Source metadata.evidence_translated: Elderly public housing residents in Hong Kong should retire in the Greater Bay Area to free up precious public housing for young people and young families to settle.

stakeholders.Role: Provides economic support and business opportunities

Source metadata.filename: 2023_Transferring elderly public housing residents to the Greater Bay Area to free up units for young workers.pdf
Source metadata.evidence_original: 根據⋯⋯這家撲克有限公司在大灣區的經濟狀況做出了突出貢獻
Source metadata.evidence_translated: According to... this Poker Limited has made significant contributions to the economic situation in the Greater Bay Area.

stakeholders.Canonical Name: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology
stakeholders.Role: Conducts research and suggests policies on public housing and elderly care

Source metadata.filename: 2023_Transferring elderly public housing residents to the Greater Bay Area to free up units for young workers.pdf
Source metadata.evidence_original: 我在港大經管學院《香港經濟政策綠皮書2022》提出一個建議
Source metadata.evidence_translated: I suggested a proposal in the Hong Kong University of Science and Technology's 'Hong Kong Economic Policy Green Paper 2022'.

stakeholders.Role: General Manager of Hong Kong Elderly Welfare Management and Health Services Limited

Source metadata.filename: 2024_Bay Area Development Promotes Industrial Opportunities for Hong Kong-Style Elderly Care.pdf
Source metadata.evidence_original: 港安老咨询委员会总干事、香港安老福祉管理及健康服务有限公司董事总经理张建韬告诉大公报，恢复通关后便一直忙碌不停。
Source metadata.evidence_translated: General Manager of Hong Kong Elderly Welfare Management and Health Services Limited Zhang Jiantao told the Ta Kung Pao, after the reopening of customs, he has been busy nonstop.

stakeholders.Canonical Name: Hong Kong and Macau Service Providers
stakeholders.Role: Operate elderly care institutions in Guangdong

Source metadata.filename: 2024_Bay Area Development Promotes Industrial Opportunities for Hong Kong-Style Elderly Care.pdf
Source metadata.evidence_original: 目前，港澳服务提供者来粤兴办养老机构，在市场准入、土地供应、税费减免、财政补贴、购买服务等方面
Source metadata.evidence_translated: Currently, Hong Kong and Macau service providers are establishing elderly care institutions in Guangdong, in terms of market access, land supply, tax reduction, financial subsidies, purchasing services, etc.

stakeholders.Role: Promotes the development of elderly care services and industries

Source metadata.filename: 2024_Bay Area Development Promotes Industrial Opportunities for Hong Kong-Style Elderly Care.pdf
Source metadata.evidence_original: 粤港澳大湾区建设进入五周年，到广东跨境养老成为不少香港长者的新选项。
Source metadata.evidence_translated: The construction of the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macau Greater Bay Area has entered its fifth year, and cross-border elderly care in Guangdong has become a new option for many Hong Kong seniors.
